Poker Hand #RC1000006: Hold'em No Limit ($0.01/$0.02) - 2026/05/21 03:02:30
Table 'TestTable' 6-max Seat #1 is the button
Seat 1: Hero ($2 in chips)
Seat 2: Villain1 ($2 in chips)
Hero: posts small blind $0.01
Villain1: posts big blind $0.02
*** HOLE CARDS ***
Dealt to Hero [Ah Kh]
Hero: raises $0.04 to $0.06
Villain1: calls $0.04
*** FLOP *** [Ad 7s 2c]
Villain1: checks
Hero: bets $0.50
Villain1: folds
Uncalled bet ($0.50) returned to Hero
*** SHOWDOWN ***
Hero collected $0.12 from pot
*** SUMMARY ***
Total pot $0.12 | Rake $0 | Jackpot $0 | Bingo $0 | Fortune $0 | Tax $0
Board [Ad 7s 2c]
Seat 1: Hero (button) (small blind) collected ($0.12)
Seat 2: Villain1 (big blind) folded on the Flop
